next_steps: Send serum and urine Leptospira PCR and microscopic agglutination test (MAT)
Perform bronchoalveolar lavage to evaluate for diffuse alveolar hemorrhage
Obtain peripheral blood smear to evaluate for Babesia organisms
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotic therapy (doxycycline/ceftriaxone) and provide supportive care for renal and respiratory failure
Perform urinalysis with microscopy for granular casts and heme positivity
Serologic testing for Hantavirus and Borrelia burgdorferi
